title: MAGIC MTR Addon
description:
MAGIC MTR - MTR Addon for General Improvement and Customisation.

A very flexible addon revolutionizing MTR4.
body:
![MAGIC Mod banner](https://i.postimg.cc/nM8XH2jv/supawork-799e0570c46a4b45b0da71e073f0578c.gif)


# ✨ MAGIC Mod

MAGIC Mod, which stands for "_MTR Addon for General Improvement and Customisation_", is an mod which expands the capabilities of MTR, adding many features like an **Rail position API**, **Various Platforms** and more!

---

![Requires Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_64h.png) ![Wont support Forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_64h.png) [![Patreon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://patreon.com/MagicMTR?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink)
